description: A portrait-format graphic built on a darkened close-up photograph of a clenched fist. White text at the top reads Assaulting a federal officer may cost you your freedom. Large overlaid text reads THINK in yellow, BEFORE YOU on a red bar, and RESIST in white. The Department of Homeland Security seal and an ICE wordmark with ICE.gov appear at the lower right.
notable_text: Assaulting a federal officer may cost you your freedom; THINK BEFORE YOU RESIST; ICE; ICE.gov
